title: Strong AB Liquid Metal Weld Paste - All Purpose Repair Glue, Industrial Heat Resistance, 20ML
features: 【Strong Metal Repair Adhesive】This liquid metal weld repair paste provides a strong permanent repair to metal and many other surfaces.Liquid metal repair paste provides strong and long-lasting repairs to metals and multiple other surfaces. The metal glue will stick to almost any clean surface that is free of dirt and oil.

【High Temperature Resistance】All purpose repair glue can withstand temperatures up to 150°C. When fully cured,epoxy metal glue is as hard as iron and industrial glue provides uniform bond line thickness.

【Easy to use】Chemical metal weld glue is suitable for various harsh environments.Before using metal adhesive to repair, now clean the surface of the object. Mix the AB metal repair paste in the ratio of 1:1, after mixing to form a permanent adhesive, apply strong glue for metal to the surface of the object to be repaired 1.5 hours liquid metal weld initial solidification, 24 hours metal glue will be completely dry.

【Widely Used】The super glue all purpose can be used to repair electrical components.Our all purpose repair glue is as well as to repair cracks and fractures in automotive and ship components.This metal to metal glue can repair various mechanical repairs.The magic repair glue can has good anti-seepage and anti-corrosion performance.This metal filler has the characteristics of long-term durability

【Note】After use, please wipe off the magic metal mending agent at the AB tube outlet before putting on the cover. Otherwise the industrial heat resistance cold super glue outlet will stick to the lid. After heat resistant glue solidifies and dries, metal glue will be difficult to open the lid the next time you use it again.
description: Product Description Metal Superglue Adhesive The magic AB glue between metals has various functions, such as connection, repair, sealing, reinforcement, etc. Metal weld is suitable for repairing and bonding metals, ceramics, glass, and many hard plastics. Features mix to use powerful and effective service temperature:-60°C-150°C How to Use Our strong glue for metal is mixed in a ratio of 1:1 to form a permanent adhesive after mixing. Apply and let dry for several hours. 1.5 hours initial solidifying, 24 hours complete solidifying. Wide Range of Applications The super glue all purpose is widely used to fill casting defects such as liquid metal as well as to repair cracks and fractures.
